message:
feat(array): Add Python array module with Metal-friendly inline struct

Phase 2 of Metal GPU acceleration plan:

- Add packages/runtime/src/Lib/array.zig with TypeCode enum and Array
  struct for runtime array operations
- Register array module in import_registry.zig
- Export array in runtime.zig
- Add type inference for array.array() returning class_instance type
  to avoid PyValue wrapping
- Fix array_mod.zig inline struct to:
  - Accept allocator parameter in append() for compatibility with
    list method dispatch
  - Use var instead of const for array variables (via is_python_array
    check in value_generation.zig)

The inline struct approach generates typed arrays at compile time with
full method support (append, extend, pop, index, etc.). This is the
foundation for Metal GPU acceleration of array operations.

Note: Attribute access (a.typecode) and len(a) need additional fixes
for full compatibility.
